fields.summary: DEA and DL don't populate in the pharmacy order

content.text: Previous ticket HEAL-30582 was resolved. but this issue is back..
PDF attached (on the first page of the pdf, the DEA number is missing)

requestType.name: General Help Desk Request
requestType.description: Submit a Request or report and issue; fields below are based upon your selection.

content.text: Thanks for sending this in. I’ve assigned it to our new SF Admin to investigate. He will get back to you with his findings.
Thanks for the screenshot and details.
I found a bug in the flow that creates the pharmacy order from the opportunity. It reads those fields but does not write them onto the new order. We need to fix that in the flow and get it deployed.
The problem is not the PDF template.
The DEA line is blank on the generated PDF because that field was never populated during order creation.

The gap is in the autolaunched flow ‘Opportunity_to_Order'. The Get Opportunity Fields element queries DEA_Number__c, State_License_Number__c, and Patient_Driver_s_License__c, but the Assign Order Fields element never assigns those values onto the new Order.
This is a subflow of the screenflow: 'Screenflow - Confirmation to Create Pharmacy Order’
On an Opportunity record, click on the button ‘Generate Pharmacy Order’
A Purchase Order with Scripts pdf will be generated with a missing DEA Number.
Hey, do you have a status update on this one so I can update the customer?

choices.label: I can continue with a workaround
